CHARRES.Title: Character Resources
CHARRES.NoResources: No resources yet. Click + to add one or drop a feat, spell, or item here.
CHARRES.Name: Name
CHARRES.ManageHint: Add, edit, or remove custom resources for this character. Use +/- to change values.
CHARRES.DropHere: Drop feat, spell, or item here
CHARRES.LinkedDescriptionHint: Description comes from the linked item. Use the resource icon (chat) or open the item sheet to view it.
